text:
was a of the 104th Cadet Corps who fought in the battle of Trost District.

Appearance

Ruth appeared to be a thin, petite woman. She wore the typical uniform of any cadet with a gray button-up shirt underneath.

Story

The Struggle for Trost arc

In the aftermath of the battle of Trost District, Ruth is among the corpses to whom Annie Leonhart apologizes.

Trivia

Ruth was not given a name in the anime, but instead was first named in the spin-off visual novel Wall Sina, Goodbye.
Ruth's name is Hebrew in origin, meaning "compassionate friend."
